policy_description: This step applies Step 14P decisions into a future cross-check input manifest only.
Accepted for future struct_conn cross-check is not a ready candidate label.
Exactly five user-selected inputs are passed forward.
The remaining twenty candidates are retained as pending manual review.
Raw/mmCIF struct_conn cross-check is not performed here.
Feature semantics audit remains required before training.
Leakage/split design gate remains required before training.
The five canonical mask tasks including scaffold_only/B3 remain unchanged.
